# subscript(_:)

**Instance Subscript**

Access the page that the ID points to, if any.

## Declaration

```swift
subscript(pageID: AssignedWorkDocument.Page.ID) -> AssignedWorkDocument.Page? { get }
```

## Accessing work documents

- **subscript(_:)**: Access the score annotation that the identifier refers to, if any.

items.description: Access the score annotation that the identifier refers to, if any.
items.name: subscript(_:)

title: subscript(_:)
